title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a teacher can sign in from the landing page and land on the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Reach the dashboard from the landing page
description: This verifies that a teacher can sign in or enter demo mode and arrive at the dashboard with classroom data available.

title: Enter the portal with demo data
description: This verifies that a user can enter Demo Mode from the landing page and reach the dashboard with seeded classroom data.

steps.description: Verify seeded classroom data is displayed

title: View dashboard analytics and risk flags after data entry
description: This verifies that the dashboard shows updated attendance, grade analytics, and risk indicators after classroom data has been recorded.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify student risk indicators are displayed

title: Record attendance for a session date
description: This verifies that a teacher can select a date, set attendance for students, and save the session record.

steps.description: Click the link to open attendance tracking
Set attendance status for each student
Verify the session log is updated
Verify the recorded attendance appears for the selected date

title: Enter scores and recalculate totals
description: This verifies that a teacher can update student scores, save them, and see totals recalculate in the gradebook.

steps.description: Click the link to open the gradebook
Verify the updated score is displayed

title: Enter assignment scores and recalculate grades
description: This verifies that a teacher can create an assignment, enter student scores, and see totals and component grades update.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter a score for a student
Verify the updated grade totals are displayed
Verify the recalculated component grades are displayed

title: Review analytics and risk overview
description: This verifies that the dashboard shows attendance, grade, and risk information needed to monitor a class.

steps.description: Click the link to open the dashboard
Verify risk indicators and classroom alerts are displayed

title: Save an all-present attendance session
description: This verifies that a teacher can record a full present session and see it saved for the chosen date.

steps.description: Click the link to open attendance tracking
Verify the class is recorded for the session
Verify the session log shows the saved attendance entry

title: Create a classroom with grading settings
description: This verifies that a teacher can create a classroom and save semester, grading, threshold, and behavior settings.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the classroom name field with a unique classroom name
Adjust the grading weights and threshold settings
Verify the classroom is displayed in the classroom list
Verify the grading configuration is displayed

title: Create an assignment in the gradebook
description: This verifies that a teacher can add a new assignment with its grading details and see it added to the gradebook.

steps.description: Click the link to open the gradebook
Verify the assignment appears in the gradebook
Verify a new gradebook column is displayed

title: Add a student to the roster
description: This verifies that a teacher can add a new student with identifying details and see the roster update.
category: Student Roster Management with Excel Import/Export

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the student code field with a unique student code
Fill in the student prefix field with a prefix
Fill in the student name field with a unique student name
Fill in the notes field with student notes
Verify the new student is displayed in the roster

title: Create and configure a classroom
description: This verifies that a teacher can create a classroom and set grading weights and thresholds needed for later grading workflows.

steps.description: Click the link to open classroom settings
Verify the grading configuration is saved

title: Import a roster from Excel
description: This verifies that a teacher can import student roster data from an Excel file and see the roster populated.
category: Student Roster Management with Excel Import/Export

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the roster is populated with imported students

title: Update classroom grading settings
description: This verifies that a teacher can edit an existing classroom's semester, grading, threshold, and behavior settings and keep the changes.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update the grading weights and threshold settings
Verify the updated classroom settings are displayed

title: Delete a student from the roster

category: Student Roster Management with Excel Import/Export

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Edit a student in the roster

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Review attendance history for a class session
description: This verifies that a teacher can open attendance history and review saved session logs.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Generate a report card or transcript and export it
description: This verifies that a teacher can generate a report card or transcript and export it for sharing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Generate a report card or transcript
Verify the generated report is displayed

title: Generate a report card for a student
description: This verifies that a teacher can generate a report card from the reports area for external sharing.

steps.description: Click the link to open reports
Verify the report card is displayed
Verify the generated report is available

title: Generate a report card and export it as PDF
description: A teacher can create a report card on the reports page and export it as a PDF for sharing.

steps.description: Verify a report card is displayed

title: Generate a transcript and export it as Excel
description: A teacher can create a transcript on the reports page and export it as an Excel file for external use.

title: Generate and save an AI student summary
description: This verifies that a teacher can select a student, generate an AI performance summary, review the analysis, and save it.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the student strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations are displayed
Verify the saved report is displayed

title: View AI student insights
description: This verifies that a teacher can select a student and generate a performance summary with strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations.

steps.description: Click the link to open AI insights
Verify the insight summary is displayed
Verify strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations are displayed

title: Generate an AI performance summary for a student
description: A teacher can select a student and generate an AI insight summary with strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations.

steps.description: Choose a student from the available student list
Verify an AI performance summary is displayed
Verify strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations are displayed

title: Export the roster to Excel

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

description: This verifies that a teacher can flag a submission as late and save the score entry with the late status preserved.

steps.description: Click the link to open the gradebook
Verify the late submission status is displayed
Verify the saved score remains visible

title: Switch between report card and transcript formats
description: A teacher can change the report type and confirm the displayed report updates accordingly before exporting.

steps.description: Verify the displayed report changes to the transcript view

description: A teacher can generate an AI insight and save the resulting report for later review.

Verify the report is saved successfully
Verify the saved insight remains available in the interface

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

title: Export a transcript for external sharing

Verify the generated transcript remains visible in the reports view

title: Review AI insights for a different student
description: A teacher can switch to another student and see that the displayed AI insight updates to match the newly selected student.

steps.description: Choose one student from the available student list
Choose a different student from the available student list

title: Handle invalid classroom grading values
description: This verifies that a teacher cannot save invalid semester, weight, or threshold values and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to save the classroom settings

title: Handle duplicate student codes
description: This verifies that a teacher cannot save a student with a code that already exists and sees a duplicate validation message.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Handle invalid attendance or grade entry values
description: This verifies that a teacher sees validation feedback when entering an incomplete attendance date or an out-of-range score.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to save attendance without selecting a valid session date
Attempt to save the score entry
Verify validation errors are displayed for the invalid entry

title: View the AI insights empty state before generating analysis
description: A teacher can open the AI insights page and see guidance or an empty state before any analysis is generated.

steps.description: Verify an empty state or guidance message is displayed before analysis is generated

title: See the reports page empty state before generation
description: A teacher can open the reports page and see that no report is shown until one is generated.

steps.description: Verify an empty state or prompt to generate a report is displayed
